name: WildhavenCEO
summary: A CEO workspace agent. Drop a vault of strategy / legal / budget / pitch / playbook documents in, then ask questions and get answers in a confident operator's voice. Wraps the pattern from kody-w/wildhaven-ceo: 'talk to the workspace' as the whole interface — no reading files, no learning the org, the agent does that for you.

question.description: What you're asking. Used for action=ask, decide, respond_to.

workspace_context.description: A dump of the relevant vault documents — strategy, legal, budget, pitch, playbooks. The agent reads this and answers in your voice. Optional but recommended; without it, the agent answers from generic CEO posture.

voice_style.description: How to sound. Default: 'confident operator who has skin in the game'.
